nodes.label: CLAUDE.md — repo guidance for Claude Code
RLS enabled on every table/bucket, deny-by-default
nodes.rationale: Security-critical app storing secrets; new table without RLS is treated as a hard error, not deferred work.

nodes.label: Prisma Client bypasses RLS (trusted server-side only)
nodes.rationale: Prisma connects directly to DB and never passes through RLS, same trust level as service_role admin client — must be used only server-side with explicit justification, never as a per-user data access replacement for lib/supabase/server.ts.

nodes.label: Supabase as single Auth/DB/Storage ecosystem
nodes.rationale: RLS works natively with auth.uid() across Postgres tables and Storage policies; a separate auth provider like Auth.js would require manual session-to-RLS mapping and a second source of truth for identity.

hyperedges.label: Security-first design intent documented across governance files
